data.title: Celonis and Oracle Collaborate to Power Enterprise AI and Accelerate IT Modernization
data.description: Celonis has recently revealed an expanded partnership with Oracle in New York and Munich. This collaboration aims to assist businesses in revitalizing operations and integrating Enterprise AI effectively.

data.title: Ghost Murmur: Lockheed's Quantum Heartbeat Hunter The CIA Used To Pluck US Airman Out Of Iran's Desert
data.description: Lockheed Martin Corp.'s innovative "Ghost Murmur" technology, which may seem like something out of a science fiction movie, recently played a crucial role in transforming combat search and rescue efforts. In a recent operation, the CIA utilized this previously unused system to assist in extracting a U.S. airman whose F-15E aircraft had been downed in the mountains of Iran. This groundbreaking technology, developed within Lockheed's secretive Skunk Works division, utilizes a classified quantum-sensing platform capable of detecting the electromagnetic signature of a human heartbeat from a great distance. According to reports from the New York Post, President Donald Trump was astounded by the success of the mission, describing it as "unbelievable." This system combines highly sensitive quantum magnetometers with artificial intelligence to identify and isolate an individual's heartbeat amidst the electromagnetic noise produced by the Earth's natural signals, vehicles, and infrastructure. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com. The deployment of this technology has captured the attention of investors, resulting in fluctuations in KTOS stock.

data.title: AKEEYO Unveils AKY-NV-X2, AKY-710Lite, and AKY-730Pro at Global Sources Hong Kong 2026
data.description: Join us at Booth 7S20 from April 11-14, 2026 in SHENZHEN, China, as AKEEYO presents its complete range of smart recording solutions designed for both two- and four-wheeled vehicles. AKEEYO, a prominent developer in this sector, will be showcasing its products at the Global Sources Hong Kong 2026 event. The exhibition runs from April 11-14 in Hong Kong, Asia.

data.title: OperaWine 2026: Vinitaly's Red Carpet Opening Act Returns to Verona
data.description: Veronafiere, alongside Vinitaly and Wine Spectator, will present the fifteenth installment of OperaWine on April 11, 2026. This prestigious event will unite 150 top Italian wine producers and attract a select audience of influential figures.

data.title: SuperX Japan Global Supply Center Completes First Batch Delivery, Marking Strategic Partnership Milestone in Japan
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Singapore, SuperX AI Technology Limited (NASDAQ: SUPX), a leading provider of AI data center infrastructure solutions, revealed the completion of their initial shipment of high-performance AI products.

data.title: Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund declares dividend
data.description: PITTSBURGH - As of April 10, 2026, the Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: FMN) has announced the declaration of a dividend. The fund aims to offer investors ongoing dividend income that is free from regular federal income tax. Along with this benefit, the fund also highlights income exempted from other taxes.

data.title: Fuse Expands U.S. Radiation Testing Capacity with New Albuquerque Facility
data.description: A cutting-edge testing infrastructure is set to address key obstacles and speed up the advancement of defense, space, and semiconductor technologies. Based in San Leandro, California, Fuse, a top fusion company in the United States, unveiled plans on April 10, 2026, to establish a new testing facility. This initiative aims to bolster the deployment process by enhancing testing capabilities.

data.title: MediStreams Achieves Clean SOC 2 Type II Certification, Strengthening Security in Healthcare Revenue Cycle Management and Payment Automation
data.description: Atlanta-based healthcare revenue cycle management company, MediStreams, specializing in automated payment posting and reconciliation, revealed the completion of its SOC 2 Type II examination for the period from January 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025. The examination, carried out by independent CPA firm Aprio LLP, followed the standards set by the AICPA. This signifies that the company's systems met the stringent criteria for security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy. The successful examination underscores MediStreams' commitment to data security and compliance with the industry's best practices.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Citigroup Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Citigroup Inc. (stock symbol: C) is scheduled to announce its first quarter earnings on April 14th, with analysts projecting earnings of $2.61 per share, a significant increase from the $1.96 per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue estimates for the quarter stand at $23.44 billion, up from $21.6 billion in the previous year. Prior to the earnings release, analyst Glenn Schorr from Evercore ISI Group maintained an In-Line rating for Citigroup, adjusting the price target to $115, while analyst Richard Ramsden from Goldman Sachs reiterated a Buy rating and raised the price target to $137 from $123. Citigroup's current annual dividend yield is 1.92%, with investors keeping an eye on potential gains from dividends. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
